scenarios.treatment_description: Your losses from the first 3 rounds have been REALIZED: you physically handed over the money you lost in cash to the experimenter. That money is gone from your envelope. You are now making a fresh investment decision for the final round.

Your losses from the first 3 rounds remain ON PAPER: you have been shown your accumulated balance on screen, but no money has changed hands. Your total earnings (including these losses) will be settled at the end of the experiment.
